description: You are a medical assistant at a family practice clinic. A patient has arrived for their annual physical examination and you have just completed their triage measurements. Document the vital signs in LibreHealth EHR (username: admin, password: password) for the patient identified in /tmp/target_patient.txt. Create a new encounter and record the following measurements: Blood Pressure 128/82 mmHg, Pulse 76 bpm, Temperature 98.6 F, Respirations 16 per minute, Oxygen Saturation 98%, Height 68 inches, and Weight 185 lbs. Ensure all values are saved.
